always_on_rule: MetaBlooms core governance is mandatory for all MetaBlooms work; cartridge governance layers on top and never replaces baseline governance.

current_forbidden_methods.exception_policy: Only allowed if explicitly authorized by a future stage, file-count/size threshold is bounded, timeout budget is declared, checkpoint receipt is written before and after, and failure cannot block smaller validation fallback.
current_forbidden_methods.observed_failure: unzip -tqq and jar xf full recursive extraction timed out/stalled during FL17-MERGE-5 validation; user had to stop turn.
replacement_methods: selective extraction/read of required boot-critical files
current_forbidden_methods.scope: MetaBlooms full OS export/recovery validation in ChatGPT-style sandbox

current_preferred_methods.scope: large MetaBlooms OS bundle validation in ChatGPT sandbox

denylist_rule: A method with repeated timeout/stall, user-interrupted runaway behavior, or structural incompatibility with the sandbox becomes forbidden-by-default once evidence is recorded in a receipt or validation report.

forbid_after_pattern: two or more timed-out bounded attempts
same failure class recurs across stages
forbid_immediate: causes unbounded/stalled turn requiring user stop
promote_preferred: passes repeated validation in current environment
has lower blast radius than alternatives
is aligned with external governance/provenance guidance

prefer_rule: A method becomes preferred only when evidence shows repeated successful use or a clearly safer bounded mechanism; promotion must name scope, evidence, replacement target, and rollback/exception conditions.
